summary: Motor de Inteligencia Fiscal (Intelligent Tax Engine) - Complete testing of tax calculation with sale type hierarchy, NCF generation with authorized_sale_types, and real-time PaymentScreen updates. All features verified working.

minor.issue: Transient 520 error during one test (Cloudflare timeout) - likely infrastructure issue, not code bug

passed_tests: PRUEBA A: Backend /api/taxes/calculate-cart with Consumo Local - ITBIS=36.00 (18%), Propina=20.00 (10%), Total=256.00
PRUEBA B: Backend /api/taxes/calculate-cart with Gubernamental - ITBIS=0.00, is_government_exempt=true, Total=220.00
PRUEBA C: Frontend PaymentScreen real-time update - Changing from B02 to B14 updates ITBIS from 32.40 to 0.00 instantly
PRUEBA D: Backend /api/ncf/generate-for-sale - Rejects $0.00 bill_total correctly
Backend: GET /api/sale-types returns 8 sale types including Gubernamental
Backend: GET /api/tax-config returns 5 tax configurations (ITBIS, ITBIS_REDUCIDO, PROPINA, ISC, EXENTO)
Backend: GET /api/taxes/category/{id}/config returns tax_ids for category
Backend: POST /api/taxes/category/config saves category tax configuration
Backend: GET /api/ncf/sequences returns sequences with authorized_sale_types field
Frontend NCF Tab: Dialog shows 'Autorizado para estos Tipos de Venta' selector with checkboxes
Frontend Inventario Tab: Category dialog shows 'Impuestos Aplicables' with ITBIS, ITBIS 16%, Propina Legal, Impuesto Selectivo switches
Frontend PaymentScreen: NCF button shows B02/B14 pill with sale type name
Frontend PaymentScreen: Tipo de Venta dialog shows NCF types (B02, B01, B14, B15) and service types
critical_code_review_comments: Motor de Inteligencia Fiscal correctly implements hierarchy: Tax = (Sale Type) AND (Product or Category)
Gubernamental/Especial sale types correctly exempt ITBIS via is_government_exempt flag
Category tax_ids field properly inherits to products without custom taxes
NCF sequences properly include authorized_sale_types for sale type → NCF mapping
PaymentScreen useEffect correctly recalculates taxes when selectedServiceType changes

features_verified.prueba_c_realtime_update: PASS - Changing sale type updates totals instantly in PaymentScreen
features_verified.prueba_d_ncf_generate_for_sale: PASS - Endpoint exists, rejects $0 bills, decrements sequence
features_verified.frontend_ncf_authorized_sale_types: PASS - Dialog shows checkbox list of sale types
features_verified.frontend_category_tax_switches: PASS - Dialog shows ITBIS, ITBIS 16%, Propina Legal, ISC checkboxes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Motor de Inteligencia Fiscal fully implemented. PaymentScreen dynamically recalculates taxes when sale type changes. B14 (Gubernamental) correctly sets ITBIS=0. NCF sequences have authorized_sale_types field. Categories have tax_ids for inheritance.
